overview: Restore Hyper Wellness provides personalized, science-backed therapies designed to improve sleep, energy, mood, manage pain and inflammation, and support athletic recovery and anti-aging. Core offerings include IV drip therapy with NAD+ options, cryotherapy, red light therapy, infrared sauna, and skin health services.
highlights: IV drip therapy and intramuscular shots with NAD+ options
Skin services including facials, peels, and dermaplaning
Cryotherapy, red light therapy, infrared sauna, and compression
targetAudience: People pursuing wellness optimization, athletic performance, anti-aging, and aesthetic improvements.
